providerPolicy: Fish Audio is the primary Scooter voice clone source; D-ID is the primary talking-avatar renderer; HeyGen is secondary avatar fallback; ElevenLabs is fallback-only voice. Uploaded Scooter audio is a voice sample/clone source, not a finished clip.
coreProductRule: Talking AI Scooter appears at required MVP moments through runtime generation and cache policy. Reusable generic moments are cached by stable asset key; dynamic founder-specific moments are generated per session/content hash. Text/static mode is degraded fallback, not the intended product concept.

clips.approvedWhen: generated once, reviewed, cached, and optionally committed as fallbackSrc
generated per session after Story Card text is available; cached only for same session/content hash
generic version can be generated once/reused; contextual version must be session/content scoped

runtimeMediaCacheContract.cacheKeyRule: reusable moments use stable approved cache keys; dynamic moments use session/content hash keys and must not be globally reused
runtimeMediaCacheContract.reuseRule: reuse only when moment is generic and contains no founder/company/session-specific content
runtimeMediaCacheContract.dynamicPrivacyRule: personalized final_summary media is session/content scoped and must never be served as a generic clip
runtimeMediaCacheContract.textFirstRule: Story Card text must render before video; media generation is asynchronous and non-blocking
runtimeMediaCacheContract.fallbackRule: if runtime media generation/cache retrieval fails, show text/static Scooter fallback honestly
runtimeMediaCacheContract.committedAssetRule: committed src is optional for reusable seed/demo clips; runtime generation path plus cache policy is sufficient for product proof until a clip is approved and stored
